note: Anonymized fixture inputs for Dhammapada lookup verification. No PII; these mimic post-anonymization device payloads. `expectUseWhen` / `expectThemes` are sanity hints the shortlist top candidates should overlap; human tone review is still required.

fixtures.name: anger
fixtures.anonymizedText: Someone cut in line and I felt a hot wave of anger rise up. I wanted to snap at them.

fixtures.name: craving
fixtures.anonymizedText: I keep craving something I know is not good for me and I cannot stop wanting it.

fixtures.name: grief
fixtures.anonymizedText: I just lost someone close to me and the grief comes in waves I cannot control.

fixtures.name: shame
fixtures.anonymizedText: I feel so ashamed and embarrassed about what I did. I keep blaming myself for it.

fixtures.name: panic
fixtures.anonymizedText: My chest is tight, I feel like I cannot breathe and a wave of panic keeps washing over me.

fixtures.name: conflict
fixtures.anonymizedText: I had a big argument and we both said things in the heat of the fight.

fixtures.name: speech-regret
fixtures.anonymizedText: I said something harsh I deeply regret saying and I wish I could take the words back.

fixtures.name: rumination
fixtures.anonymizedText: I cannot stop thinking about the same problem, my mind loops over it again and again.

fixtures.name: gratitude
fixtures.anonymizedText: I feel really grateful and thankful today for the people who have supported me.

fixtures.name: restlessness
fixtures.anonymizedText: I feel restless and agitated, I cannot sit still and my thoughts will not settle.
